Lodging Boons.name: Lodging Boons
Lodging Boons.description:
Spending extra gold on lavish accommodations can provide valuable temporary benefits. These perks might include quicker recovery, valuable contacts, additional resources, or unique opportunities. The specific benefits depend on the quality of the lodging and the amount spent. You can roll from the table, or award a Minor, Major, or even EPIC Boon based on how much the heroes pay and where they rest:

  • A Minor Boon: Typically costs around 10 gp.
  • A Major Boon: Typically costs around 100 gp.
  • An EPIC Boon: Typically costs around 1,000 gp.

These Boons are temporary and last only until the heroes take another Safe Rest. Adjust the cost and impact to suit your campaign and the party's level of wealth.

1d8Temporary Boon
1Recover 2 additional Wounds
2Gain LVL temp HP
3Gain KEY temp Hit Dice
4+1 Speed
5Inspired (reroll any die, once)
6Advantage vs. Fear/Charm/Etc.
7Learn an important rumor
8+KEY mana

Veteran.name: Veteran
Veteran.description: +10 HP. [M]

Unnatural Talent.name: Unnatural Talent
Unnatural Talent.description: Learn any 1 Utility Spell. [M]

Unflinching.name: Unflinching
Unflinching.description: Your focus is unbroken even in the face of danger. Advantage on Concentration checks. [M]

Tough.name: Tough
Tough.description: Whenever you gain temp HP, gain 5 more. [M]

Tenacious.name: Tenacious
Tenacious.description: +2 max Hit Dice. [M]

Stalwart.name: Stalwart
Stalwart.description:
+1 max Hit Die. [M]

+2 Might. [A]

Sniper.name: Sniper
Sniper.description: Advantage on attacks when no enemy is adjacent to you; disadvantage otherwise. [M]

Smart, Not Book Smart.name: Smart, Not Book Smart
Smart, Not Book Smart.description: –KEY max mana. Gain 1d4 mana whenever you roll Initiative; this expires if unused at the end of combat. [M]

Resolute.name: Resolute
Resolute.description: When pushed, you are pushed 1 space less. Whenever you would be knocked Prone, you can instead be moved back 1 space. 1/turn. [M]

Resilient.name: Resilient
Resilient.description: If you would take any Wounds, you may become immune to them this turn instead. 1/Safe Rest. [M]

Natural Talent.name: Natural Talent
Natural Talent.description: Learn 1 Cantrip in a school you don't know. [M]

Lionhearted.name: Lionhearted
Lionhearted.description: +2 Armor while you have the most enemies adjacent to you. [M]

Honorable Protector.name: Honorable Protector
Honorable Protector.description: Gain LVL temp HP whenever you Interpose. Suffer LVL psychic damage whenever an ally within 2 spaces is attacked and you don't Interpose. [M]

Hardy.name: Hardy
Hardy.description: Whenever you would roll your Hit Dice to increase your max HP, roll with advantage 2 instead. [M]

Good Patient.name: Good Patient
Good Patient.description: Whenever you would receive healing, you heal an additional KEY HP. [M]

Expansive Mind.name: Expansive Mind
Expansive Mind.description: +4 max mana. [M]

Brave.name: Brave
Brave.description: +2 to damage while you have the most enemies adjacent to you. [M]

Ancestry Trait.name: Ancestry Trait
Ancestry Trait.description: Selecting another Ancestry trait (if it makes sense) can make for a great Major Boon. [M]

Aggressive.name: Aggressive
Aggressive.description: On your first round of combat you can spend 1 Action from your next turn. [M]

Epic Stats.name: Epic Stats
Epic Stats.description: Increase 3 different stats by 1. [M]

Epic Stamina.name: Epic Stamina
Epic Stamina.description: Rolling 4 or higher on a Hit Die during a Field Rest heals 1 Wound. [M]

Epic Speed.name: Epic Speed
Epic Speed.description:
+4 Speed [M]
+4 Initiative [A]

Epic Senses.name: Epic Senses
Epic Senses.description: Gain Blindsight 6 or Darkvision 16. [M]

Epic Resistance.name: Epic Resistance
Epic Resistance.description: 1/encounter. Whenever you would suffer damage or fail a save you can choose not to instead. [M]

Epic Mind.name: Epic Mind
Epic Mind.description: +8 mana. [M]

Epic Mana.name: Epic Mana
Epic Mana.description: Whenever you are healed, you may instead recover 1 mana for every 5 HP you would have been healed. [M]

Epic Knowledge.name: Epic Knowledge
Epic Knowledge.description: 1/day, you can call upon a moment of profound insight to gain hidden knowledge about a legendary person or object. [M]

Epic Foresight.name: Epic Foresight
Epic Foresight.description:
Gain +5 to Initiative rolls [A]

and advantage on your first attack each encounter. [M]

Epic Defense.name: Epic Defense
Epic Defense.description: Your shields gain +3 Armor. [M]

Epic Criticals.name: Epic Criticals
Epic Criticals.description: Whenever you roll for critical hit damage, you may replace one die with a d20. [M]

Epic Agility.name: Epic Agility
Epic Agility.description: Gain 1 action. 1/encounter. [M]
